_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 7 currently banned, 2796 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Failed attempts at 10151 (up from 10065, +86). fail2ban total bans 2796 (up from 2778, +18). 7 IPs currently banned (up from 1). Standard botnet scanning continues. Only authorized logins from novakj via sudo.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 25 usages across viewer.js, upload.js, merge.js, annotate.js, pages.js, split.js, redact.js - all static templates, clearing operations, static SVGs, HTML entities, or integer-only interpolation. No user data injected unsafely.

watermark_module_review.innerHTML_note: Zero innerHTML usages. All display uses textContent.
watermark_module_review.image_upload_validation: MIME type validated (PNG/JPG only), 10MB size limit enforced
watermark_module_review.user_data_handling: Text watermark from input field passed to pdf-lib drawText (not HTML). Font/color/size from controlled UI inputs. Page range parsed with parseInt and bounds-checked.
watermark_module_review.pdf_processing: Uses pdf-lib for watermark embedding. All client-side. Loaded with ignoreEncryption.

redact_module_review.innerHTML_note: 3 usages: line 233 static HTML entity (×), line 288 static string, line 299 integer-only interpolation (page numbers and counts from internal state). No user data in any innerHTML.
redact_module_review.user_data_handling: Search query used for case-insensitive string matching against pdf.js text content only. Never injected into HTML. Displayed via showToast (textContent). Manual marks use integer coordinates from drawing events.
redact_module_review.pdf_processing: Uses pdf-lib to draw opaque rectangles. Client-side only.
redact_module_review.redaction_limitation: IMPORTANT: Draws opaque rectangles over content but does NOT remove underlying content streams from the PDF. Hidden text/image data may still be extractable. This is a functional limitation, not a web security issue.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split module multi-file downloads

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.
TASK-016 redaction tool draws opaque rectangles but does NOT strip underlying content streams - redacted text/images may still be extractable from the PDF file. Users should be warned.
notes: Full security review completed - 33 checks passed, 0 critical findings

Reviewed new watermark.js module (TASK-013): Zero innerHTML usages. All display via textContent. Image upload validates MIME type (PNG/JPG) and size (10MB). Object URLs revoked after use. Text watermark goes to pdf-lib drawText, not HTML.

Reviewed new redact.js module (TASK-016): 3 innerHTML usages all safe (static entity, static string, integer-only interpolation). Search query used for string matching only, displayed via textContent. confirm() dialog before irreversible action.

IMPORTANT functional concern: redact.js draws opaque rectangles over content but pdf-lib cannot remove underlying content streams. Hidden data may still be extractable. This should be documented for users.
All 16 JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write(), or unsafe patterns found
25 innerHTML usages across 7 files - all verified safe (up from 22 across 6 files)
SSH: botnet scanning continues at normal rate. fail2ban active with 2796 total bans (+18). 7 IPs currently banned. Only authorized logins from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (79 days remaining)
recommendations: MEDIUM: Add user-facing warning in redaction UI that underlying PDF data may not be fully removed - only visually covered. Consider adding metadata stripping or content stream rebuild in future.
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config (no scripts exist)
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
